mnemonics: Alice & Bob Send Messages Carefully (A & B S M C) - Represents the need for Authentication, Authorization, Secrecy, Message Integrity, and Control of access in a simple protocol.
keyPoints: A simple protocol must ensure confidentiality to prevent eavesdropping.
It must guarantee integrity to ensure messages are not altered in transit.
It should provide authentication to verify the identities of the communicating parties.
commonMistakes: Assuming a protocol is secure without analyzing it for potential eavesdropping or man-in-the-middle attacks.
Overlooking the need for nonces or sequence numbers to prevent replay attacks.
Focusing only on encryption and forgetting to ensure message integrity and authentication.
